best_bet.reason: The slightly larger 2 to 4 foot surf combined with that strong south to north longshore current makes Pender the most interesting choice if you're looking for a bit more action than New Hanover but want to avoid the rip current hazards creeping up over in Brunswick.

counties.name: New Hanover County
counties.beaches: Wrightsville Beach · Carolina Beach · Kure Beach

counties.name: Brunswick County
counties.beaches: Oak Island · Holden Beach · Ocean Isle Beach · Sunset Beach
